add-png-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
add-png-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend, insert a PNG image onto page two at specific coordinates, and save the modified document.

replace-image-with-bmp.title: Replace PDF Image with High‑Resolution BMP
replace-image-with-bmp.description: Demonstrates how to replace the first image on the first page of a PDF with a higher‑resolution BMP using the PdfContentEditor facade.

overlay-semi-transparent-gif-on-pdf.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF on PDF
overlay-semi-transparent-gif-on-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent GIF over an existing PNG image in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's compositing parameters and PdfFileMend.

add-word-wrapped-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Word‑by‑Word Wrapped Footer to PDF Pages
add-word-wrapped-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a formatted footer with automatic word‑by‑word wrapping to every page of a PDF document.

add-promotional-text-multiple-pdf-pages.title: Add Promotional Text to Multiple PDF Pages
add-promotional-text-multiple-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates inserting the same promotional message on pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend.AddText with a page array.

add-multi-line-text-with-custom-spacing.title: Add Multi‑Line Text with Custom Spacing to PDF Page
add-multi-line-text-with-custom-spacing.description: Shows how to create a FormattedText block, add lines with custom line spacing, and place the block on the left margin of page three using the PdfFileMend facade.

add-image-and-text-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Image and Text Watermark to PDF
add-image-and-text-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to combine an image stamp and a semi‑transparent text stamp using Aspose.Pdf Facades to create a watermark over each page of a PDF document.

add-background-image-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image to All PDF Pages
add-background-image-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfFileMend facade to overlay a PNG image as a full‑page background on every page of an existing PDF document.

add-header-image-to-pdf.title: Add Header Image to PDF Files
add-header-image-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a header image into one or more PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp.

add-company-logo-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Company Logo to All PDF Pages
add-company-logo-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to batch‑process a folder of PDFs and overlay a PNG company logo in the top‑right corner of every page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-png-signature-on-all-pdf-pages.title: Insert PNG Signature on All PDF Pages with PdfFileMend
insert-png-signature-on-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfFileMend facade to add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of every page in a PDF and save the modified document.

add-tiff-image-to-last-pdf-page.title: Add TIFF Image to Last PDF Page with PdfFileMend
add-tiff-image-to-last-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfFileMend to insert a TIFF image onto the final page of an existing PDF without modifying the existing content.

dynamic-image-placement.title: Dynamic Image Placement on PDF Page
dynamic-image-placement.description: Demonstrates calculating image coordinates from a PDF page's dimensions and adding the image using the PdfFileMend facade.

add-image-to-pdf-with-format-validation.title: Add Image to PDF with Format Validation
add-image-to-pdf-with-format-validation.description: Demonstrates how to validate an image's file format and then add the image to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf. The example checks for supported formats before invoking the AddImage method.

modify-pdf-with-pdffilemend-try-finally.title: Modify PDF Using PdfFileMend with Try-Finally Cleanup
modify-pdf-with-pdffilemend-try-finally.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, optionally modifying it, saving the result, and guaranteeing that the PdfFileMend facade is closed in a finally block to ensure resources are released.

add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to insert multiple images into a PDF using the PdfFileMend facade and handle missing or failing image files with proper exception logging.

add-image-and-text-with-audit-logging.title: Add Image and Text to PDF with Audit Logging
add-image-and-text-with-audit-logging.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to bind a PDF, insert an image and formatted text on specific pages, and log each operation with a timestamp for audit purposes.

wrap-text-by-words-using-pdffilemend.title: Wrap Text by Words Using PdfFileMend
wrap-text-by-words-using-pdffilemend.description: Demonstrates how to enable the ByWords word‑wrapping mode with PdfFileMend and add a long paragraph that automatically wraps within the defined page width.

add-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image to Specific PDF Page
add-image-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert an image onto a chosen page of a PDF document at given rectangle coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-image-to-pdf-memory-stream.title: Add Image to PDF and Return as MemoryStream
add-image-to-pdf-memory-stream.description: Shows how to insert an image onto the first page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and return the modified PDF in a MemoryStream for further processing such as an HTTP response.

async-add-image-to-pdf.title: Asynchronously Add Image to PDF using PdfFileMend
async-add-image-to-pdf.description: Shows how to wrap PdfFileMend operations in Task.Run to add an image to the first page of a PDF without blocking the calling thread.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF to PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF document and save each image as an individual PNG file.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages-2-5.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages 2‑5
extract-images-from-pdf-pages-2-5.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF within a specific page range and save them to a temporary directory.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs with Page and Index Naming
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files, extract images from each page using PdfExtractor, and save them with filenames that include the PDF name, page number, and image index.

remove-image-from-pdf-page.title: Remove Image from PDF Page
remove-image-from-pdf-page.description: Shows how to delete a specific image on a given page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

remove-all-images-from-pdf.title: Remove All Images from PDF
remove-all-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete every image in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the modified document to a new file.

replace-low-res-images-with-high-res-png.title: Replace Low-Resolution Images with High-Resolution PNGs in PDF
replace-low-res-images-with-high-res-png.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page and its images, and replaces every low‑resolution image with a specified high‑resolution PNG using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

verify-added-text-coordinates.title: Verify Added Text Coordinates with PdfContentEditor
verify-added-text-coordinates.description: Creates a blank PDF, adds a free‑text annotation at a specific rectangle using PdfContentEditor, then loads the result and asserts that the annotation's rectangle matches the expected X and Y coordinates.

add-image-verify-pdf-byte-size.title: Add Image to PDF and Verify Byte Size Increase
add-image-verify-pdf-byte-size.description: Creates a blank PDF, inserts a PNG image using PdfFileMend, saves the result, and asserts that the modified PDF's byte size is larger than the original.
